title: Chapter 280
content:
Chapter 279, God’s Position

Quiet, deadly quiet!

Everyone was horrified by this inexplicable situation, and they all stopped fighting, whether it was Lin Xuanfeng or Luo Family.

Everyone looked at the constantly vibrating mountain, shocked to speak.

Only Luo Yunhai and Xue Ningxiang were happy, their eyes flashing with excitement. From the moment that angry roar began, they had already understood that their guardian god, Zhuo Fan was here!

“Uh, Lord Lin, this”

On the side of Lin Xuanfeng, someone wanted to ask him what to do next, but he turned around and saw him immediately. I couldn’t find the trace, I couldn’t find it when I searched for it, I didn’t feel a curse in my heart!

Your grandma’s Lin Xuanfeng, shouted louder than anyone when she rushed, and called them rubbish. But when he escaped, he escaped faster than anyone else, and ran away without a sound.

Such a ruthless, unscrupulous, courageous rat generation, can actually be included in the six dragons and one phoenix, I am!

His heart was burning with anger. The man glanced around at everyone present, and saw that everyone had no morale to fight, and it seemed that there was going to be something extraordinary from the Luo family, even Lin Xuanfeng was scared away.

Then what are they doing here, waiting to die?

So the man waved his hand and shouted to everyone: “Withdraw!”

At this time, people looked back and noticed that Cyclone Lin had already run out of sight. So without saying anything, he immediately retreated.

They were originally the dominant party, but when they ran, they were extremely embarrassed. They couldn’t even take care of the wounded, so they escaped as if they were the defeated party.

Seeing this scene, Luo Yunhai shook his head and sighed: “Brother Zhuo is Brother Zhuo, and he screams everywhere. A roar scared more than a thousand people away! It was more tapered than we just had. Breaking through, it’s much stronger!”

Xue Ningxiang nodded proudly when she heard it, and a small star flashed in her eyes! I haven’t seen Zhuo Fan’s figure yet, but he is already overwhelmed by his mighty power. It’s obviously his fan!

Xue Gang and Xue Lin both shook their heads and smiled bitterly. Zhuo Fan appeared in time and saved them, of course it is a good thing! But their girl, under Zhuo Fan’s charm, seemed to sink deeper, but this was a bit dangerous!

At this moment, Zhuo Fan is like a god in Xue Ningxiang’s heart. It seems that every time she encounters danger, he can appear in time!

This is by no means a good sign!

The two of Xue Gang and Xue Lin looked at each other. They understood, but they both shook their heads helplessly.

In the past, Ning”er could not listen to their persuasion, but now it has been repeatedly verified by the fact that Zhuo Fan appeared in time, even less able to listen to them.

Oh!

The two shook their heads for a while and sighed.

Then, in the joy of rebirth after the disaster, everyone began to look after the wounded and clean up the battlefield. After about a quarter of an hour, but hearing a thunder and exploding, a dark shadow suddenly fell.

Everyone turned their heads to look, but it was the soaring dragon that made the enemy frightened, no doubt outstanding!

Looking around, glanced at everyone, Zhuo Fan cursed, “Let Lin Xuanfeng run away again! When I run into him next time, I must remove his other leg. Let him crawl around in front of Lao Tzu in the future!”

Everyone was sweating profusely and looked at Zhuo Fan in awe!

I am afraid that in this universe, among the younger generation, there is only this soaring dragon Zhuo Fan who dares to provoke the six dragons and the phoenix so arrogantly. If you put it on them, and let them have a hundred courage, you wouldn’t dare to speak such arrogant words!

For a time, people looked at Zhuo Fan with more envy and admiration.

This is a man who is not afraid of the sky and is not afraid of the sky!

I didn’t care about the admiration of others, Zhuo Fan turned to Luo Yunhai and Xue Ningxiang, and cared: “Yunhai, Ning”er, are you all right!”

Xue Ningxiang could not help but shake Shaking her head, there was a bright smile on her face: “Don’t worry, Brother Zhuo, I’ll be fine! I know that you will be next to Ning”er in times of crisis!” said, and raised his hands. Thunder Ring.

Zhuo Fan also smiled, also waved his hand, the Thunder Spirit Ring on his finger flashed with a strange light.

“Brother Zhuo, I have taken Master Liu’s healing pill. It is already much better, and I will probably be fine soon!” At this time, Luo Yunhai also paled in his cheeks and smiled towards Zhuo Fan.

Unconsciously raised his brows, Zhuo Fan turned his head and looked at the old figure standing beside him, muttering: “Master Liu?”

“Ha ha ha Zhuo Master, it’s been a long time since I saw you, don’t come here unharmed!” Liu Yizhen looked at Zhuo Fan and bowed respectfully.

Zhuo Fan couldn’t help but a look of doubt flashed in his eyes: “Why are you here? Isn’t this time a hundred schools of thought contend for a family disciple under the age of 30 to participate? Master Liu, are you old?”

“Uh, Master Zhuo, don’t get me wrong. The old man is not a disciple of the Hundred Schools of Thought, and I don’t know that this Beast King Mountain will be chosen as the place for the decisive battle of the Hundred Schools of Thought. The old man is just going to the mountain to gather medicine and just meet That’s it!” Liu Yizhen said bye again, explaining.

Taking a deep look at him, Zhuo Fan was still suspicious: “Really such a coincidence?”

“It’s such a coincidence. Maybe this is my fate with Master Zhuo!” Liu Yizhen nodded calmly and answered.

Zhuo Fan curled his mouth in disdain, waved his hand and said: “Go go, don’t get close, what fate do I have with you?”

Liu Yizhen felt stagnant and a little depressed. The ground lowered his head.

Seeing this, Luo Yunhai rushed to help out: “Brother Zhuo, in fact, we were able to survive this time. A large part of the reason is that Master Liu assisted. He is really our Luo The great benefactor of the family! I heard that he admires you very much and has the willingness to apprentice. It’s better to”

“Liu Yizhen, after so many years, your intention of worshiping me as a teacher has not given up?” But not yet When Luo Yunhai finished speaking, Zhuo Fan was already staring at Liu Yizhen and questioned.

Unconsciously, Liu Yi really nodded his head anxiously: “Of course, the master Zhuo is the master of alchemy among the people seen by the old man. It is true that the old man can worship Master Zhuo. What I want in my life!”

“Such words”

His eyes narrowed involuntarily, Zhuo Fan stared at his eyes closely, and faintly said: “Also, we are missing Manpower, just your old man has caught up! If you can protect the Luo family in this controversy of a hundred schools of thought, contribute to the family and apprentice, I can think about it!”

“Oh, I will do my best As far as you can, you can live up to the great expectations of Master Zhuo!” Liu Yizhen hurriedly paid his respects.

Zhuo Fan’s eyes flashed, and he nodded slightly.

Luo Yunhai was also overjoyed when he saw this, he gave Liu Yizhen a fist, and congratulated him for finally touching Zhuo Fan’s heart.

Liu Yizhen also bowed respectfully to Luo Yunhai, thanking him for his support and reputation, otherwise Zhuo Fan would definitely be the same as six or seven years ago, he would never be a bird!

In this way, Liu Yizhen completely became a temporary Luo family, looking after everyone’s injuries, and Zhuo Fan didn’t have the time to heal other people, just sitting in Taniguchi and guarding them.

However, because he is sitting there, people can heal their wounds at ease and are not afraid of enemy harassment.

Oh, the soaring devil dragon, even if the six dragons and one phoenix dare not easily provoke the existence, there is really no more trustworthy guardian in the world!

So, for ten consecutive days, Zhuo Fan meditated in Taniguchi, while the rest of the people healed and recuperated in the valley.

However, their battle here has just subsided, another place. The war will begin again!

In a lush mountain forest, a piece of emerald jade stone as high as two persons stands right next to a tall giant tree in the sky. Look closely, it is very similar to the Five Elements Town State Stone, but it is exactly the wooden gate of the Five Elements Town State Stone in the Beast King Mountain!

On both sides of it, there are two groups of people and horses.

On one side are Chu Qingcheng of Huayulou, Xie Tianshang of Jianhou Mansion and Long Xingyun of Qianlong Pavilion, and the other side are Huangpu Sky-upholding of Emperor’s Gate, Youyu Mountain of Nether Valley and Yan Bangui and others in the Palace of Medicine King!

The two sides are at war, staring at each other.

Behind the wooden gate, the major families in Yunlong City also passed through this gate to watch the confrontation between the two sides.

Huang Pu Tianyuan curled his lips in disdain, glanced at everyone present, seeming to talk to himself, but he seemed to announce to everyone: “There is no suspense, it seems that the God of Escape Pill belongs to us. Hahaha!”

You Wanshan in Netherworld Valley and Uncle Yan from the Medicine King Hall nodded together, their faces showing pride.

Following the emperor’s gate, it’s so confident, so arrogant and cool!

The grandmother Chu Bijun of Huayulou, the pavilion master Long Yifei of Qianlong Pavilion, and the three of Jianhou Mansion Xie Xiaofeng, their faces were gloomy and extremely ugly! Although they didn’t want to admit it, they knew in their hearts that this battle was a one-sided loss. Just Huangpu Sky-upholding alone, they already have no chance of winning!

Originally, Chu Qingcheng first discovered that Yi Shen Dan fell in front of the wooden formation gate. But I didn’t expect Huangpu Sky-upholding and the others to follow.

In this way, the battle surrounding this Yi Shen Dan will begin! However, they had no chance of winning in the face of the Zhentian Emperor Long!

“This monster!”

Grandma gritted her teeth bitterly and cursed secretly. Huang Pu Tianyuan laughed unconsciously, and even more glamorous!

When Zhuge Changfeng saw this, he also shook his beard and nodded slightly: “Yes, there is a strong abnormal monster on one side, but the monster on the other side has not arrived yet. This situation is indeed true. The biggest disadvantage is to surrender obediently!”

As soon as this statement came out, everyone responded!

Yes, they have Huangpu Sky-upholding over there, but we also have Zhuo Fan here! I heard that the two played against each other for the first time, and Zhuo Fan was able to restrain the emperor dragon!

But, at such a critical moment, where did that kid go?

For a while, everyone hated it in their hearts, saying that the alliance is good, and the chain will be dropped at a critical moment.

Ahee!

Facing the rising sun, Zhuo Fan sneezed loudly for no reason, and felt a cool breeze blowing behind his back!

“Grandma, a bear, who is talking bad about me behind your back?” Zhuo Fan touched his nose, his face full of suffocation.

Read Light Novel THE STEWARD DEMONIC EMPEROR – Chapter 279: God’s Position

Author: Night Owl

Translation: Artificial_Intelligence
